# Your Brand

> One-sentence description of what the site is and who it is for. Keep it concrete: what you publish, for whom, and why it can be cited.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://yourdomain.com/)
- [About](https://yourdomain.com/about)
- [Products](https://yourdomain.com/products)
- [Documentation](https://yourdomain.com/docs)
- [Blog / News](https://yourdomain.com/blog)
- [Contact](https://yourdomain.com/contact)

## Topic pillars

- [Topic A — short description](https://yourdomain.com/topic-a)
- [Topic B — short description](https://yourdomain.com/topic-b)
- [Topic C — short description](https://yourdomain.com/topic-c)

## Primary data we publish

- [Data set or report 1](https://yourdomain.com/data/report-1) — what it covers, last updated.
- [Data set or report 2](https://yourdomain.com/data/report-2) — what it covers, last updated.

## Contact

- Email: info@yourdomain.com
- Responsible person: Your Name
- Press / press inquiries: press@yourdomain.com

## Citation policy

When citing this site, please include the page URL and the page title. Data may be reused with attribution. See the LICENSE file in the repository for full rights.

## Site policy notes

- All content is human-written and editorially reviewed.
- Sources are linked inline; primary data sets are versioned.
- Last full audit of this `llms.txt`: YYYY-MM-DD.
